stories.title: Incendios en España: focos activos en Almorox (Toledo), La Mierla (Guadalajara), Aragón y Castilla y León, hoy en directo
stories.summary: España es el país de la UE con mayor superficie forestal quemada en lo que va de año, con una cifra de terreno afectado que se ha duplicado en las dos últimas semanas, situándose ya cerca de las 120.000 hectáreas quemadas, según datos del Sistema Europeo de Información sobre Incendios Forestales. El incendio de La Mierla (Guadalajara), que ha arrasado unas 32.000 hectáreas , sigue activo, aunque ya en fase de estabilización. "Prácticamente no ha avanzado" durante la última noche, ha señalado la consejera de Desarrollo Sostenible, Mercedes Gómez. El de Selas, también en la misma provincia, ya se encuentra perimetrado tras arrasar más de 2.000 hectáreas .

stories.title: CCNL “Istruzione e Ricerca” 2025-2027: parte normativa, prosegue la trattativa all’ARAN
stories.summary: Si è svolto mercoledì 22 luglio 2026 un nuovo incontro tra ARAN e organizzazioni sindacali per il rinnovo del CCNL “Istruzione e Ricerca” 2025-2027 , limitatamente alla parte normativa . In apertura dei lavori, la Direttrice Generale dell’ARAN, Maria Vittoria Marongiu, ha illustrato la nuova bozza contrattuale , aggiornata sulla base degli esiti dei tavoli tecnici dedicati al personale AFAM e al personale scolastico in servizio nelle scuole italiane all’estero. Le principali novità Tra le novità introdotte figurano tre nuovi articoli dedicati all’impatto dell’ Intelligenza Artificiale sull’organizzazione del lavoro.

stories.title: Pardo de Vera intenta sin éxito que la sentencia del Supremo sobre el 'caso mascarillas' no la perjudique en la Audiencia
stories.summary: La ex secretaria de Estado de Transportes y ex presidenta de Adif, Isabel Pardo de Vera, ha movido ficha despu�s de que el Tribunal Supremo la considerara una actora clave para enchufar a la ex amante del ex ministro Jos� Luis �balos,J�sica Rodr�guez, en dos empresas p�blicas dependientes de Transportes, Ineco y Tragsatec. La investigada se ha topado, sin embargo, con un 'portazo' de la Sala Penal. Pardo de vera considera que, con su fallo del caso mascarillas, el Alto Tribunal ha vulnerado sus derechos fundamentales a la tutela judicial efectiva, a la presunci�n de inocencia, y a la defensa. El Supremo, sin embargo, ha rechazado sus argumentos.

stories.title: What will Andy Burnham’s VAT cut on electricity bills mean for you?
stories.summary: Households in Great Britain will see their electricity bills exempt from VAT for six months starting October 1, saving an estimated £45 annually, as part of new cost-of-living measures announced by Prime Minister Andy Burnham. This VAT cut, which applies to the winter months when energy costs are typically highest, aims to alleviate financial pressures on families. In Northern Ireland, VAT will remain at 5%, but the government will provide funding for similar support measures.

stories.title: Il était surnommé le "boucher" en Ukraine : pourquoi Volodymyr Zelensky a-t-il limogé son commandant en chef des armées ?
stories.summary: Il était surnommé le "boucher" en Ukraine : pourquoi Volodymyr Zelensky a-t-il limogé son commandant en chef des armées ? Volodymyr Zelensky a cédé à la pression de la rue. Mardi 21 juillet, dans la soirée, le président ukrainien s'est finalement résigné à renvoyer son commandant en chef des armées, le général Oleksandr Syrsky , conspué lors de manifestations qui ont agité l'Ukraine ces derniers jours. "Je suis reconnaissant envers Oleksandr Syrskyi et envers chacun de nos soldats pour les positions solides qu'occupe l'Ukraine sur le front", a écrit le chef de l'État sur ses réseaux sociaux, rendant un hommage appuyé au commandant déchu.

stories.title: Monaco : Aladji Bamba va signer en Angleterre pour plus de 40M€
stories.summary: Actif sur le mercato avec les arrivées d’Ansu Fati (FC Barcelone), Sadibou Sané (FC Metz) et Flavio Nazinho (Cercle Bruges), l’AS Monaco doit aussi vendre. Le club de la Principauté s’est séparé pour le moment de Caio Henrique (Ajax Amsterdam), Kassoum Ouattara (Besiktas), Radoslaw Majecki (Pafos) et Krépin Diatta (libre). Les Monégasques sont sur le point de réaliser une grosse vente supplémentaire. Selon nos informations, le club anglais de Newcastle a bouclé l’arrivée du milieu défensif Aladji Bamba (20 ans). Le joueur va arriver aujourd’hui en Angleterre dans le cadre d’un transfert s’élevant à 41 millions d’euros, dont 5 millions d’euros de bonus.

stories.title: El gran debut de Natalia, hija de Carlos Sobera y Patricia Santamarina, a sus 18 años y rodeada de su familia
stories.summary: Patricia Santamarina no podría haber empezado mejor los 55. La mujer de Carlos Sobera ha celebrado su cumpleaños con una fiesta en la que no solo ha estado muy bien acompañada por su familia y amigos, entre ellos personalidades muy conocidas, sino que también ha supuesto el debut público de la menor de sus hijas, Natalia, quien cumplió 18 años en abril. Para soplar las velas en buena compañía, la productora televisiva y teatral se decantó por un plan infalible. Después de pasar por el photocall instalado especialmente para la ocasión, la celebración comenzó con una cena en el Restaurante Jimmy's, el espacio gastronómico de la sala Gabana.

stories.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
stories.summary: Big picture: Shreyas Iyer looking for first win India 's role in helping smaller cricket economies generate income via TV rights generally dominates chatter ahead of a Zimbabwe tour. But series defeats to Ireland and England have veered the discussion towards India's T20I failings and team combinations. When they arrived in Zimbabwe two years ago, they were led by Shubman Gill. Now, T20Is are the only format Gill isn't part of. The captaincy mantle has been passed on from Suryakumar Yadav to Shreyas Iyer , who is winless as captain after seven games.

stories.title: Camarda e Comotto, rinnovo al Milan e prestito? Si fanno avanti due club
stories.summary: Al momento sono in ritiro con il Milan, freschi di accordo per il rinnovo fino al 2031, ma la loro stagione potrebbe continuare altrove. Parliamo di Christian Comotto e Francesco Camarda, i due talenti classe 2008 rientrati alla base rossonera dopo i prestiti con Spezia e Lecce. , Il centrocampista è entrato nel mirino del Parma, che pensa ad un prestito annuale per valorizzarlo. Stessa formula, eventualmente, per Camarda, che piace molto alla Sampdoria in Serie B. , Per ora, entrambi proseguono la loro estate con il ritiro agli ordini di Ruben Amorim, che li sta valutando attentamente in questi primi giorni a Milanello. Nelle prossime settimane, la scelta definitiva.

stories.title: Scheffler not keen on McIlroy-DeChambeau feud
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler not keen on Rory McIlroy and Bryson DeChambeau feud Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:38 Getty World number one Scottie Scheffler is playing in the 3M Open in Minnesota, starting today World number one Scottie Scheffler admits he has "never been a big fan of personal jabs" after Rory McIlroy publicly criticised Bryson DeChambeau at last week's Open Championship.

stories.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall in Louisiana, flooding hits Virginia & Carolinas
stories.summary: Tropical Storm Bertha made landfall in Louisiana, bringing maximum sustained winds of 45 miles per hour and heavy rainfall to the region. As of late Wednesday night, a Tropical Storm Warning is in effect from the Alabama/Mississippi border to Sargent, Texas, while flooding impacts are also being felt in Virginia and the Carolinas. The National Hurricane Center anticipates Bertha will continue moving westward, prompting ongoing monitoring and preparedness efforts.

stories.title: SC Telstar blijft actief en legt met Feyenoord-talent zesde aanwinst vast
stories.summary: SC Telstar heeft Fabiano Rust vastgelegd, zo maakt de club donderdag bekend op hun officiële kanalen. De 21-jarige aanvaller trainde de afgelopen weken al mee bij de club uit Velsen-Zuid en tekent nu een contract tot medio 2028, met een optie tot nog een jaar. Rust speelde de afgelopen jaren in de jeugdopleiding van Feyenoord en speelde mee bij het belofteneltal. De aanvaller mocht deze zomer transfervrij vertrekken en trainde de afgelopen vier weken mee met Telstar. Rust heeft in die periode hoofdtrainer Henk Brugge genoeg overtuigd voor een contract. Bij de beloften van Feyenoord kwam Rust in totaal tot 75 wedstrijden, waarin de aanvaller goed was voor 26 doelpunten en vijf assists.

stories.title: Festnahme nach Messerangriff auf Dorffest in Egling
stories.summary: Das Dorffest im oberbayerischen Egling ist am Wochenende von Gewalt überschattet worden. Im Fokus der Ermittlungen stand besonders ein Messerangriff. Jetzt hat die Polizei einen Verdächtigen festgenommen. Nach Angaben eines Sprechers des Polizeipräsidiums Oberbayern Süd handelt es sich um einen Heranwachsenden mit deutscher Staatsangehörigkeit aus dem Landkreis Bad Tölz-Wolfratshausen, der bereits mehrfach polizeilich in Erscheinung getreten ist, unter anderem mit Körperverletzung, Drogendelikten und Widerstand. Der 18- bis 20-jährige Tatverdächtige sitzt inzwischen in U-Haft. Einsatzkräfte nahmen den jungen Mann am Montagabend an seiner Wohnanschrift fest.

stories.title: Live: SWR Aktuell Baden-Württemberg 19:30 Uhr in Gebärdensprache
stories.summary: Die SWR Aktuell Hauptausgabe der Nachrichten täglich live in Gebärdensprache (DGS), werktags 19.30 Uhr bis 20.00 Uhr, sonntags 18.00 Uhr - 18.15 Uhr.

stories.title: 21 frases de Riquelme antes del debut de Boca en la Sudamericana: el pase de Villa y por qué Argentina perdió ante España
stories.summary: Juan Román Riquelme habló con TyC Sports a horas del debut de Boca Juniors en los playoffs de la Copa Sudamericana, donde el Xeneize recibirá este jueves a las 21:45 en la Bombonera al chileno O’Higgins por los 16avos de final. El presidente del club se refirió al mercado de pases, al regreso de Rodolfo Arruabarrena al banco azul y oro y a la vuelta de Sebastián Villa, además de proyectar el segundo semestre que tendrá al equipo en tres frentes simultáneos. “Estamos en el lugar más lindo del mundo.

stories.title: Elon Musk Says Grok Will Make an AI ‘Odyssey’ Film That Is ‘Historically Accurate’ by the End of the Year
stories.summary: Elon Musk announced on X that Grok Imagine will produce a "historically accurate" AI-generated film adaptation of Homer’s Odyssey by year’s end. The tech mogul criticized Christopher Nolan’s recent blockbuster version but now aims to release his own AI-driven take. Grok’s first clip, featuring Odysseus and Calypso, has already surfaced online.

stories.title: Großer Versandhändler insolvent: 74 Angestellte bei bekannter Online-Apotheke betroffen
stories.summary: Sanicare, a major German online pharmacy, filed for insolvency on July 15, 2026, affecting 74 employees. The company, based in Bad Laer, Lower Saxony, reported €80 million in revenue last year despite financial struggles. The insolvency process will proceed under self-administration to continue operations.

stories.title: L’assèchement généralisé des sols et des cours d’eau en France inquiète les hydrologues
stories.summary: Cet article vous est offert Pour lire gratuitement cet article réservé aux abonnés, connectez-vous Se connecter Vous n'êtes pas inscrit sur Le Monde ? Inscrivez-vous gratuitement Planète Planète Planète Sécheresse Sécheresse Sécheresse Les eaux de surface et les sols sont en proie à une forte sécheresse. Si la situation des nappes souterraines est plus contrastée, des conflits sur les usages de l’eau couvent. Read in English Article réservé aux abonnés La Seine est sous perfusion. Au niveau de la gare d’Austerlitz, à Paris (13 e arrondissement), la moitié de son débit provient des lacs-réservoirs installés en amont du fleuve et de ses affluents, en Champagne et en Bourgogne.

stories.title: Stroomuitvalschema in Ca Mau van 23 t/m 26 juli 2026: Veel woonwijken zullen de hele dag zonder stroom zitten.
stories.summary: Stroomuitvalschema in Ca Mau van 23 t/m 26 juli 2026: Veel woonwijken zullen de hele dag zonder stroom zitten. Stroomuitvalschema Ca Mau Daarom wordt hier de vroegst mogelijke informatie over het stroomuitvalschema in Ca Mau (stroomonderbrekingsschema Ca Mau) van 23 tot en met 26 juli 2026 verstrekt, zodat mensen zich ruim van tevoren kunnen voorbereiden op onverwachte stroomuitval die onnodig ongemak veroorzaakt. Bedrijven en productiebedrijven in gebieden waar stroomonderbrekingen gepland zijn, moeten op de hoogte blijven van de informatie om hun installaties efficiënt te kunnen laten functioneren.

stories.title: Carreño, ante una oportunidad de oro
stories.summary: Pablo Carreño va camino de hacer historia en el ATP Estoril. El tenista español viene en un gran momento en los últimos meses y en Portugal tiene una oportunidad de oro para volver a tocar metal. Asimismo, tiene en su mano la posibilidad de convertirse en el primer bicampeón de la historia del torneo luso. Desde que se fundara en 2015, nadie ha podido levantar el trofeo en más de una ocasión. Algunos grandes nombres que figuran en la lista de campeones son el del exjugador Richard Gasquet, Casper Ruud o el griego Stefanos Tsitsipas.

stories.title: Trump's nuclear deal with Saudis jettisons longstanding US demands
stories.summary: Past US presidents insisted that Saudi Arabia normalise relations with Israel in exchange for nuclear technology. Image source, EPA By Daniel Bush Washington The Trump administration's nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia reversed a years-long stance toward a key Middle East ally. Past US presidents insisted that Saudi Arabia normalise relations with Israel in exchange for receiving American nuclear technology for civilian energy programmes. President Donald Trump gave Saudi Arabia what it wanted without extracting concessions for Israel in return - and over objections from critics who argued that it could spark a nuclear arms race in the region.

stories.title: 'Let's enjoy the ride' says Elon Musk, as AI fears mount
stories.summary: Elon Musk says AI progress is unstoppable, calling it an "incredible abundance for all" despite risks. His remarks follow OpenAI’s Tuesday report that some advanced AI models hacked a startup during a security test. Musk made the comments in an interview published the day after the OpenAI revelation.

stories.title: Bank of Ireland eyes domestic economic growth of 3.5%
stories.summary: Bank of Ireland forecasts domestic economic growth of 3.5% this year, up from 2.5% in 2027. The bank expects just under 40,000 homes to be built in 2026, an increase from 36,000 last year. Inflation is projected to ease to 3.1% this year and 2.7% next year.

stories.title: Venice Film Festival Sees Sharp Drop in Female Directors in Competition, With May El-Toukhy Standing Solo
stories.summary: The Venice Film Festival has seen its steepest decline in female directors in five years, with only one woman, May El-Toukhy, competing for the Golden Lion this year. This marks a significant drop from last year's six female filmmakers, who represented 29% of the main competition. In contrast, the Horizons section will feature a record eight female-directed films, accounting for 42% of its lineup.

stories.title: Venice Lesbian Drama ‘Big Little Things’ Boards Moebius Entertainment for Worldwide Sales
stories.summary: Michelle Zhou’s debut feature “ Big Little Things ” has landed backing from Hong Kong-based Moebius Entertainment , which will handle worldwide sales and festival representation after the Hong Kong-U.S. co-production earned a berth in the Horizons section of the 83rd Venice Film Festival . The story centers on a woman who moves back to her native Harbin after spending years in the U.S., only to find herself torn between the relationship she has built with her girlfriend and the pull of her family’s expectations. Zhou’s screenplay weaves together questions of identity, belonging and the compromises required when personal truth collides with inherited obligation.

stories.title: Scottish gossip: Hogh, Hassan, Kyogo, Engels, Vitek, Dragojevic, Wilson
stories.summary: Celtic rekindle transfer interest in Norway-based striker and receive encouragement in hunt for a new goalkeeper... Celtic have resurrected their interest in Bodo/Glimt striker Kasper Hogh after missing out on the 25-year-old Dane in January. Scottish Sun , external Celtic have submitted a second "huge" offer for Oviedo and Egypt winger Haissem Hassan. Ghomuria via Daily Record - subscription required , external Tottenham Hotspur have set their sights on Celtic midfielder Arne Engels.

stories.title: Wirtschaft: Europa hat viel Vermögen – investiert aber zu wenig
stories.summary: Der weltweite Wohlstand wächst einer Studie zufolge schneller als die Wirtschaftsleistung. Die globale Bilanz erhöhte sich 2025 auf insgesamt ​1800 Billionen Dollar, nach rund 1700 Billionen Dollar im Vorjahr. Dies geht aus einer am Donnerstag veröffentlichten ‌Analyse des McKinsey Global Institute (MGI) hervor. Davon entfielen rund 620 Billionen Dollar auf Realwerte wie Immobilien und Infrastruktur und 570 Billionen Dollar auf das Vermögen privater Haushalte. »Europa ist reich an Vermögen und ‌arm an Investitionen«, sagte Jan Mischke, Partner beim MGI und ​Autor der Studie.

stories.title: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
stories.summary: A group including the former England footballer write to the new PM telling him "we can afford it". Millionaires including former footballer Gary Lineker and music producer Brian Eno have written to new prime minister Andy Burnham asking to be taxed more. In an open letter, 120 well-off Britons told Burnham: "We can afford it. We're not talking about higher taxes on those who get up and go to work for their income every day, but on the very richest whose income is derived from the wealth they hold." Organised by Patriotic Millionaires, the letter said it would lead to a more equal society, and urged a "devolution of wealth and power from the very richest".

stories.title: Islanders asked to 'track' not 'trample' Asian hornets
stories.summary: Guernsey is urging residents to help track, not harm, Asian hornets to protect local bees and biodiversity. So far this year, 205 queens have been caught and nine primary nests destroyed. Islanders are asked to photograph hornets and note their flight path before reporting sightings.

stories.title: Thousands evacuated in France fires
stories.summary: A third firefighter has died in Europe while tackling ongoing wildfires across the continent. Around 12,000 people have been evacuated from the south-west of France as the country battles ongoing wildfires days after two firefighters died near Bordeaux airport, French media reported. The Gironde region government said more than 2,400 hectares (5,900 acres) of land have been destroyed. The use of internal combustion and electric engines have been banned in predominantly forested areas, and a number of roads have been closed. No injuries have been reported on Thursday.

stories.title: The Bottom Line
stories.summary: A panel of business leaders named the top winners and losers in the last 12 months during The Bottom Line annual awards on July 23, 2026. Host Evan Davis led the event, praising or criticizing breakthrough products and strategic missteps. The judges included Nicola Hodson, Peter Bazalgette, and Edwina Dunn.

stories.title: ‘Veterinary medicines’ found in milk sparks urgent supermarket recall
stories.summary: An urgent “do not consume” warning has been issued for a popular milk brand over fears it may be contaminated with penicillin. Graham’s Family Dairy is recalling its semi-skimmed milk with an expiration date of 31 July 2026 due to a possible health risk. The alert applies to its one-litre, two-litre, and single-pint bottles sold in the UK. Anyone who has bought one of these products has been told not to consume it and to return it to the place of purchase for a full refund. Food Standards Scotland states that the reason for the recall is the “presence of veterinary medicines”.

stories.title: AJ Styles Is ALREADY Talking About Un-Retiring... (WWE News)
stories.summary: WWE Hall Of Famer and all-round wrestling great AJ Styles refused to shut the door on a sensational in-ring return during a chat with Chris Van Vliet on the reporter's 'Insight' show recently . AJ's last match came with a loss to 'Ring General' Gunther back at Royal Rumble in January. Since then, rumours have been flying around the place about the possibility of Styles moving over to work for Tony Khan and AEW , but the man himself has been keen to Phenomenal Forearm those into touch and shut the rumour mill down. He's repeatedly said that he's happy in WWE's system and considers the company home. So, would another match come under WWE's banner? Not necessarily.

stories.title: Afrique du Sud : Pretoria, nouvelle vitrine d’un padel en pleine accélération
stories.summary: En quelques années seulement, l’Afrique du Sud est devenue le principal marché du padel sur le continent africain. Du 26 juillet au 2 août, Pretoria accueillera le premier tournoi Premier Padel organisé dans le pays. Initialement annoncé comme un P2, l’événement a finalement été promu en P1, donnant une nouvelle dimension à cette première historique. Un développement spectaculaire depuis 2019 L’histoire du padel sud-africain est encore récente. Le premier terrain identifié dans le pays a ouvert à la fin de l’année 2019 au sein du domaine de Val de Vie, près de Paarl, dans la province du Cap-Occidental.

stories.title: Isabelle Ithurburu (43 ans) en maillot de bain : "Magnifique", l'animatrice fait grimper la température
stories.summary: Figure emblématique du paysage audiovisuel français, Isabelle Ithurburu s'est récemment confiée sur son parcours dans les colonnes de La Tribune dimanche. "J’étais une bonne élève mais je n’avais aucune fascination pour les études longues. Je voulais vite entrer dans la vie active, travailler, voyager", a-t-elle confié avant de révéler avoir "choisi un BTS trilingue parce qu’il [lui] permettait de partir à l’étranger et de faire des stages". Par la suite, l'animatrice a "poursuivi avec une licence, surtout pour faire plaisir à [s]a mère". Et ce, sans "aucun plan de carrière".

stories.title: Le gouverneur de la Banque de France offre un bureau et une secrétaire à son prédécesseur
stories.summary: Transparence et probité — Enquête Emmanuel Moulin, ancien secrétaire général de l’Élysée, recasé à la tête de la Banque de France, a fourni un bureau flambant neuf et une assistante à l’ancien gouverneur François Villeroy de Galhau, qui lui avait donné un coup de pouce pour préparer ses auditions au Parlement. Les petits arrangements entre amis continuent à la Banque de France.
stories.trend: gouverneur de la banque de france

stories.title: ONE PIECE 1189, i primi spoiler svelano segreti sul terrificante potere di Im
stories.summary: I primi spoiler di ONE PIECE 1189 sono arrivati con diverse ore d'anticipo rispetto al previsto e, a quanto pare, il capitolo farà parecchio discutere. Le anticipazioni diffuse dall'insider PewPiece non si limitano infatti a mostrare un nuovo scontro contro Rufy , ma aggiungono un dettaglio che sembrerebbe confermare una teoria sul vero potere di Im . Dopo il cliffhanger del capitolo precedente, la storia riprende subito dal confronto con il Re del Mondo . Im estrae una nuova arma, chiamata Spada del Dio del Mare , e passa all'attacco. Rufy viene trafitto e inchiodato a un albero con due spade, mentre Usopp percepisce immediatamente che qualcosa non va.

stories.title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
stories.summary: The European Union has fined Google’s parent company Alphabet €890 million for violating the Digital Markets Act. The penalties target Google’s preferential treatment of its own services in search results and restrictions on Android developers’ payment options. Google must comply with new rules within 60 days or face additional fines.

stories.title: Potter and Yee among favourites at World Triathlon London event
stories.summary: Olympic medallists Alex Yee and Beth Potter will compete at the World Triathlon Championship Series in London this weekend, with Potter currently leading the women's standings. Yee, a gold medallist from Paris 2024, returns after recent marathon and 5,000m events. The series features the world's top triathletes and will conclude with finals in Pontevedra, Spain, in September.

stories.title: Metcalf out of England's Commonwealth netball squad
stories.summary: England's Natalie Metcalf says it "will take some time to process fully" after she is ruled out of the 2026 Commonwealth Games. England's Natalie Metcalf says it "will take some time to process fully" after she was ruled out of the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow because of a calf injury. The 33-year-old, who had returned to action last December following the birth of her daughter 14 months ago, picked up the issue on Monday and has been ruled out following scans. Metcalf helped England win Commonwealth Games gold on the Gold Coast in Australia eight years ago and was the only player in the 2026 squad who featured in that 2018 triumph.

stories.title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
stories.summary: Google announced yet another way to gain access to your account if you get locked out, forget your password, or don’t have access to the phone, computer, or two-factor authentication apps you typically use. As the name implies, selfie video lets you capture a short video of your face on a mobile device or PC, which is then compared to an earlier video that Google keeps on file to confirm you’re the account owner. Setting up the selfie video feature simply requires you to look at your device’s camera and follow a series of onscreen prompts that guide you through simple head movements to ensure multiple angles of your face are captured.

stories.title: Newcastle agree £34m deal for Monaco's Bamba
stories.summary: Newcastle United have agreed a £34 million deal for Monaco midfielder Bamba. The 20-year-old will join as their fourth summer signing. Newcastle continue to target young talent before transfer values rise further.

stories.title: River levels approach all-time low as drought announcement looms
stories.summary: An announcement is expected from NRW as some river levels are reported to be nearing all-time lows. River levels approach all-time low as drought announcement looms Image source, Janey Liz/Weather Watchers Image caption, Natural Resources Wales said that north and south-east Wales were moving to "prolonged dry weather" status By Steffan Messenger Wales environment correspondent and Elen Davies BBC Wales Updated 2 hours ago River levels are approaching all-time lows across Wales as an imminent "environmental drought" announcement looms for parts of the country.

stories.title: Ekhator accolto al J Medical da tantissimi bambini: ora le visite mediche
stories.summary: RCS MediaGroup S.p.A. Via Angelo Rizzoli, 8 - 20132 Milano. Copyright 2026 © Tutti i diritti riservati. | Data Mining Policy | CF, Partita I.V.A. e Iscrizione al Registro delle Imprese di Milano n.12086540155. R.E.A.

stories.title: If you think public sector workers have it better, that’s because we do
stories.summary: Public sector workers' negotiations with the government have stalled, threatening weeks of potential disruption as unions demand pay increases before discussing any changes to working practices. Strikes could begin in September when schools reopen, mirroring earlier disruptions from fuel protests.

stories.title: A New Target for Ukraine’s Long-Range Attacks: Russia’s Version of Amazon
stories.summary: Kyiv is escalating its air war by striking commercial warehouses, trying to bring the conflict closer to home for ordinary Russians.

stories.title: Global Oil Price Nears $100 a Barrel as Conflict With Iran Deepens
stories.summary: The Houthis claimed to have attacked two ships in the Red Sea, and Iran said a third caught fire near the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: The US Department of Energy says the "peaceful" co-operation agreement will give US firms "great access" to the Saudi nuclear energy programme. The nuclear issue has been at the centre of the months-long US-Israeli conflict with Iran. The two nations say one of the reasons they attacked Iran in February was to prevent the country from ever developing a nuclear weapon - something that Tehran denies planning to do. Saudi Arabia's de facto ruler, Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, told CBS News in 2018 that his own nation was not planning to acquire a nuclear weapon, but that "without a doubt if Iran developed a nuclear bomb, we will follow suit as soon as possible".

stories.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
stories.summary: Alphabet’s free cash flow turned negative for the first time in a decade, hitting minus $5.9 billion in the latest quarter as AI infrastructure costs surged. Revenue rose 23% to $119.8 billion, yet stock fell 4% after hours. The company now expects AI spending to reach $205 billion this year, up from $190 billion.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

stories.title: Nuclear Energy Revival Puts Westinghouse in Prime Position
stories.summary: The company, which filed for bankruptcy protection in 2017, stands to benefit from growing support for nuclear power and President Trump’s deal with Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: Should Travelers Give Up on Summer in Western Europe Because of the Heat?
stories.summary: A favorite vacation option may be at risk because of rising temperatures. Even those sticking with their summer plans agree: More air conditioning would help.

stories.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
stories.summary: Sonam Wangchuk has been the main draw at the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest in Delhi. The violence has stirred public anger and galvanised India's opposition, posing a challenge for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. Modi has not commented directly on the protests or engaged with the protesters, but on Thursday, he posted a statement on X that is being seen as an attempt to reach out to students who have been frustrated with repeated exam paper leaks . "Nothing is more important than the welfare and future of our youth," he wrote. "We have decided to set up fast-track courts to ensure swift and stringent punishment for those involved in paper leaks...

stories.title: Alarm over hospital lung admissions for children in England’s poorest postcodes
stories.summary: Children in England’s poorest areas are 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections than those in wealthier postcodes. In 2024/25, 1,941 per 100,000 children in deprived areas were admitted compared to 1,380 per 100,000 in affluent areas. Experts warn air pollution and deprivation are key drivers as officials review long-term health strategies.

stories.title: 'Life-changing' MS drug to help people walk now on NHS in England
stories.summary: Fampridine boosts nerve signals to make it easier to walk, with up to 5,000 eligible. The first drug to help people with multiple sclerosis walk is being made available on the NHS in England. Fampridine boosts nerve signals to make it easier for some people to move and live independently. Aysen Slack, who used to pay for fampridine privately until it became too costly, said the decision would make a "huge difference". Up to 5,000 people in England could benefit each year. The drug is already available elsewhere in the UK. Multiple sclerosis is caused by the immune system attacking the protective covering around nerve cells - known as myelin.

offbeat.title: Incendios en España: focos activos en Almorox (Toledo), La Mierla (Guadalajara), Aragón y Castilla y León, hoy en directo
offbeat.summary: España es el país de la UE con mayor superficie forestal quemada en lo que va de año, con una cifra de terreno afectado que se ha duplicado en las dos últimas semanas, situándose ya cerca de las 120.000 hectáreas quemadas, según datos del Sistema Europeo de Información sobre Incendios Forestales. El incendio de La Mierla (Guadalajara), que ha arrasado unas 32.000 hectáreas , sigue activo, aunque ya en fase de estabilización. "Prácticamente no ha avanzado" durante la última noche, ha señalado la consejera de Desarrollo Sostenible, Mercedes Gómez. El de Selas, también en la misma provincia, ya se encuentra perimetrado tras arrasar más de 2.000 hectáreas .

offbeat.title: CCNL “Istruzione e Ricerca” 2025-2027: parte normativa, prosegue la trattativa all’ARAN
offbeat.summary: Si è svolto mercoledì 22 luglio 2026 un nuovo incontro tra ARAN e organizzazioni sindacali per il rinnovo del CCNL “Istruzione e Ricerca” 2025-2027 , limitatamente alla parte normativa . In apertura dei lavori, la Direttrice Generale dell’ARAN, Maria Vittoria Marongiu, ha illustrato la nuova bozza contrattuale , aggiornata sulla base degli esiti dei tavoli tecnici dedicati al personale AFAM e al personale scolastico in servizio nelle scuole italiane all’estero. Le principali novità Tra le novità introdotte figurano tre nuovi articoli dedicati all’impatto dell’ Intelligenza Artificiale sull’organizzazione del lavoro.

offbeat.title: Pardo de Vera intenta sin éxito que la sentencia del Supremo sobre el 'caso mascarillas' no la perjudique en la Audiencia
offbeat.summary: La ex secretaria de Estado de Transportes y ex presidenta de Adif, Isabel Pardo de Vera, ha movido ficha despu�s de que el Tribunal Supremo la considerara una actora clave para enchufar a la ex amante del ex ministro Jos� Luis �balos,J�sica Rodr�guez, en dos empresas p�blicas dependientes de Transportes, Ineco y Tragsatec. La investigada se ha topado, sin embargo, con un 'portazo' de la Sala Penal. Pardo de vera considera que, con su fallo del caso mascarillas, el Alto Tribunal ha vulnerado sus derechos fundamentales a la tutela judicial efectiva, a la presunci�n de inocencia, y a la defensa. El Supremo, sin embargo, ha rechazado sus argumentos.

offbeat.title: What will Andy Burnham’s VAT cut on electricity bills mean for you?
offbeat.summary: Households in Great Britain will see their electricity bills exempt from VAT for six months starting October 1, saving an estimated £45 annually, as part of new cost-of-living measures announced by Prime Minister Andy Burnham. This VAT cut, which applies to the winter months when energy costs are typically highest, aims to alleviate financial pressures on families. In Northern Ireland, VAT will remain at 5%, but the government will provide funding for similar support measures.

offbeat.title: Il était surnommé le "boucher" en Ukraine : pourquoi Volodymyr Zelensky a-t-il limogé son commandant en chef des armées ?
offbeat.summary: Il était surnommé le "boucher" en Ukraine : pourquoi Volodymyr Zelensky a-t-il limogé son commandant en chef des armées ? Volodymyr Zelensky a cédé à la pression de la rue. Mardi 21 juillet, dans la soirée, le président ukrainien s'est finalement résigné à renvoyer son commandant en chef des armées, le général Oleksandr Syrsky , conspué lors de manifestations qui ont agité l'Ukraine ces derniers jours. "Je suis reconnaissant envers Oleksandr Syrskyi et envers chacun de nos soldats pour les positions solides qu'occupe l'Ukraine sur le front", a écrit le chef de l'État sur ses réseaux sociaux, rendant un hommage appuyé au commandant déchu.

offbeat.title: Monaco : Aladji Bamba va signer en Angleterre pour plus de 40M€
offbeat.summary: Actif sur le mercato avec les arrivées d’Ansu Fati (FC Barcelone), Sadibou Sané (FC Metz) et Flavio Nazinho (Cercle Bruges), l’AS Monaco doit aussi vendre. Le club de la Principauté s’est séparé pour le moment de Caio Henrique (Ajax Amsterdam), Kassoum Ouattara (Besiktas), Radoslaw Majecki (Pafos) et Krépin Diatta (libre). Les Monégasques sont sur le point de réaliser une grosse vente supplémentaire. Selon nos informations, le club anglais de Newcastle a bouclé l’arrivée du milieu défensif Aladji Bamba (20 ans). Le joueur va arriver aujourd’hui en Angleterre dans le cadre d’un transfert s’élevant à 41 millions d’euros, dont 5 millions d’euros de bonus.

offbeat.title: El gran debut de Natalia, hija de Carlos Sobera y Patricia Santamarina, a sus 18 años y rodeada de su familia
offbeat.summary: Patricia Santamarina no podría haber empezado mejor los 55. La mujer de Carlos Sobera ha celebrado su cumpleaños con una fiesta en la que no solo ha estado muy bien acompañada por su familia y amigos, entre ellos personalidades muy conocidas, sino que también ha supuesto el debut público de la menor de sus hijas, Natalia, quien cumplió 18 años en abril. Para soplar las velas en buena compañía, la productora televisiva y teatral se decantó por un plan infalible. Después de pasar por el photocall instalado especialmente para la ocasión, la celebración comenzó con una cena en el Restaurante Jimmy's, el espacio gastronómico de la sala Gabana.

offbeat.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
offbeat.summary: Big picture: Shreyas Iyer looking for first win India 's role in helping smaller cricket economies generate income via TV rights generally dominates chatter ahead of a Zimbabwe tour. But series defeats to Ireland and England have veered the discussion towards India's T20I failings and team combinations. When they arrived in Zimbabwe two years ago, they were led by Shubman Gill. Now, T20Is are the only format Gill isn't part of. The captaincy mantle has been passed on from Suryakumar Yadav to Shreyas Iyer , who is winless as captain after seven games.

offbeat.title: Camarda e Comotto, rinnovo al Milan e prestito? Si fanno avanti due club
offbeat.summary: Al momento sono in ritiro con il Milan, freschi di accordo per il rinnovo fino al 2031, ma la loro stagione potrebbe continuare altrove. Parliamo di Christian Comotto e Francesco Camarda, i due talenti classe 2008 rientrati alla base rossonera dopo i prestiti con Spezia e Lecce. , Il centrocampista è entrato nel mirino del Parma, che pensa ad un prestito annuale per valorizzarlo. Stessa formula, eventualmente, per Camarda, che piace molto alla Sampdoria in Serie B. , Per ora, entrambi proseguono la loro estate con il ritiro agli ordini di Ruben Amorim, che li sta valutando attentamente in questi primi giorni a Milanello. Nelle prossime settimane, la scelta definitiva.

offbeat.title: Scheffler not keen on McIlroy-DeChambeau feud
offbeat.summary: Scottie Scheffler not keen on Rory McIlroy and Bryson DeChambeau feud Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:38 Getty World number one Scottie Scheffler is playing in the 3M Open in Minnesota, starting today World number one Scottie Scheffler admits he has "never been a big fan of personal jabs" after Rory McIlroy publicly criticised Bryson DeChambeau at last week's Open Championship.

offbeat.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall in Louisiana, flooding hits Virginia & Carolinas
offbeat.summary: Tropical Storm Bertha made landfall in Louisiana, bringing maximum sustained winds of 45 miles per hour and heavy rainfall to the region. As of late Wednesday night, a Tropical Storm Warning is in effect from the Alabama/Mississippi border to Sargent, Texas, while flooding impacts are also being felt in Virginia and the Carolinas. The National Hurricane Center anticipates Bertha will continue moving westward, prompting ongoing monitoring and preparedness efforts.

offbeat.title: SC Telstar blijft actief en legt met Feyenoord-talent zesde aanwinst vast
offbeat.summary: SC Telstar heeft Fabiano Rust vastgelegd, zo maakt de club donderdag bekend op hun officiële kanalen. De 21-jarige aanvaller trainde de afgelopen weken al mee bij de club uit Velsen-Zuid en tekent nu een contract tot medio 2028, met een optie tot nog een jaar. Rust speelde de afgelopen jaren in de jeugdopleiding van Feyenoord en speelde mee bij het belofteneltal. De aanvaller mocht deze zomer transfervrij vertrekken en trainde de afgelopen vier weken mee met Telstar. Rust heeft in die periode hoofdtrainer Henk Brugge genoeg overtuigd voor een contract. Bij de beloften van Feyenoord kwam Rust in totaal tot 75 wedstrijden, waarin de aanvaller goed was voor 26 doelpunten en vijf assists.

offbeat.title: Festnahme nach Messerangriff auf Dorffest in Egling
offbeat.summary: Das Dorffest im oberbayerischen Egling ist am Wochenende von Gewalt überschattet worden. Im Fokus der Ermittlungen stand besonders ein Messerangriff. Jetzt hat die Polizei einen Verdächtigen festgenommen. Nach Angaben eines Sprechers des Polizeipräsidiums Oberbayern Süd handelt es sich um einen Heranwachsenden mit deutscher Staatsangehörigkeit aus dem Landkreis Bad Tölz-Wolfratshausen, der bereits mehrfach polizeilich in Erscheinung getreten ist, unter anderem mit Körperverletzung, Drogendelikten und Widerstand. Der 18- bis 20-jährige Tatverdächtige sitzt inzwischen in U-Haft. Einsatzkräfte nahmen den jungen Mann am Montagabend an seiner Wohnanschrift fest.

offbeat.title: Live: SWR Aktuell Baden-Württemberg 19:30 Uhr in Gebärdensprache
offbeat.summary: Die SWR Aktuell Hauptausgabe der Nachrichten täglich live in Gebärdensprache (DGS), werktags 19.30 Uhr bis 20.00 Uhr, sonntags 18.00 Uhr - 18.15 Uhr.

offbeat.title: 21 frases de Riquelme antes del debut de Boca en la Sudamericana: el pase de Villa y por qué Argentina perdió ante España
offbeat.summary: Juan Román Riquelme habló con TyC Sports a horas del debut de Boca Juniors en los playoffs de la Copa Sudamericana, donde el Xeneize recibirá este jueves a las 21:45 en la Bombonera al chileno O’Higgins por los 16avos de final. El presidente del club se refirió al mercado de pases, al regreso de Rodolfo Arruabarrena al banco azul y oro y a la vuelta de Sebastián Villa, además de proyectar el segundo semestre que tendrá al equipo en tres frentes simultáneos. “Estamos en el lugar más lindo del mundo.

offbeat.title: Elon Musk Says Grok Will Make an AI ‘Odyssey’ Film That Is ‘Historically Accurate’ by the End of the Year
offbeat.summary: Elon Musk announced on X that Grok Imagine will produce a "historically accurate" AI-generated film adaptation of Homer’s Odyssey by year’s end. The tech mogul criticized Christopher Nolan’s recent blockbuster version but now aims to release his own AI-driven take. Grok’s first clip, featuring Odysseus and Calypso, has already surfaced online.

offbeat.title: Großer Versandhändler insolvent: 74 Angestellte bei bekannter Online-Apotheke betroffen
offbeat.summary: Sanicare, a major German online pharmacy, filed for insolvency on July 15, 2026, affecting 74 employees. The company, based in Bad Laer, Lower Saxony, reported €80 million in revenue last year despite financial struggles. The insolvency process will proceed under self-administration to continue operations.

offbeat.title: L’assèchement généralisé des sols et des cours d’eau en France inquiète les hydrologues
offbeat.summary: Cet article vous est offert Pour lire gratuitement cet article réservé aux abonnés, connectez-vous Se connecter Vous n'êtes pas inscrit sur Le Monde ? Inscrivez-vous gratuitement Planète Planète Planète Sécheresse Sécheresse Sécheresse Les eaux de surface et les sols sont en proie à une forte sécheresse. Si la situation des nappes souterraines est plus contrastée, des conflits sur les usages de l’eau couvent. Read in English Article réservé aux abonnés La Seine est sous perfusion. Au niveau de la gare d’Austerlitz, à Paris (13 e arrondissement), la moitié de son débit provient des lacs-réservoirs installés en amont du fleuve et de ses affluents, en Champagne et en Bourgogne.

offbeat.title: Stroomuitvalschema in Ca Mau van 23 t/m 26 juli 2026: Veel woonwijken zullen de hele dag zonder stroom zitten.
offbeat.summary: Stroomuitvalschema in Ca Mau van 23 t/m 26 juli 2026: Veel woonwijken zullen de hele dag zonder stroom zitten. Stroomuitvalschema Ca Mau Daarom wordt hier de vroegst mogelijke informatie over het stroomuitvalschema in Ca Mau (stroomonderbrekingsschema Ca Mau) van 23 tot en met 26 juli 2026 verstrekt, zodat mensen zich ruim van tevoren kunnen voorbereiden op onverwachte stroomuitval die onnodig ongemak veroorzaakt. Bedrijven en productiebedrijven in gebieden waar stroomonderbrekingen gepland zijn, moeten op de hoogte blijven van de informatie om hun installaties efficiënt te kunnen laten functioneren.

offbeat.title: Carreño, ante una oportunidad de oro
offbeat.summary: Pablo Carreño va camino de hacer historia en el ATP Estoril. El tenista español viene en un gran momento en los últimos meses y en Portugal tiene una oportunidad de oro para volver a tocar metal. Asimismo, tiene en su mano la posibilidad de convertirse en el primer bicampeón de la historia del torneo luso. Desde que se fundara en 2015, nadie ha podido levantar el trofeo en más de una ocasión. Algunos grandes nombres que figuran en la lista de campeones son el del exjugador Richard Gasquet, Casper Ruud o el griego Stefanos Tsitsipas.

offbeat.title: Bank of Ireland eyes domestic economic growth of 3.5%
offbeat.summary: Bank of Ireland forecasts domestic economic growth of 3.5% this year, up from 2.5% in 2027. The bank expects just under 40,000 homes to be built in 2026, an increase from 36,000 last year. Inflation is projected to ease to 3.1% this year and 2.7% next year.

offbeat.title: Scottish gossip: Hogh, Hassan, Kyogo, Engels, Vitek, Dragojevic, Wilson
offbeat.summary: Celtic rekindle transfer interest in Norway-based striker and receive encouragement in hunt for a new goalkeeper... Celtic have resurrected their interest in Bodo/Glimt striker Kasper Hogh after missing out on the 25-year-old Dane in January. Scottish Sun , external Celtic have submitted a second "huge" offer for Oviedo and Egypt winger Haissem Hassan. Ghomuria via Daily Record - subscription required , external Tottenham Hotspur have set their sights on Celtic midfielder Arne Engels.

offbeat.title: Wirtschaft: Europa hat viel Vermögen – investiert aber zu wenig
offbeat.summary: Der weltweite Wohlstand wächst einer Studie zufolge schneller als die Wirtschaftsleistung. Die globale Bilanz erhöhte sich 2025 auf insgesamt ​1800 Billionen Dollar, nach rund 1700 Billionen Dollar im Vorjahr. Dies geht aus einer am Donnerstag veröffentlichten ‌Analyse des McKinsey Global Institute (MGI) hervor. Davon entfielen rund 620 Billionen Dollar auf Realwerte wie Immobilien und Infrastruktur und 570 Billionen Dollar auf das Vermögen privater Haushalte. »Europa ist reich an Vermögen und ‌arm an Investitionen«, sagte Jan Mischke, Partner beim MGI und ​Autor der Studie.

offbeat.title: ‘Veterinary medicines’ found in milk sparks urgent supermarket recall
offbeat.summary: An urgent “do not consume” warning has been issued for a popular milk brand over fears it may be contaminated with penicillin. Graham’s Family Dairy is recalling its semi-skimmed milk with an expiration date of 31 July 2026 due to a possible health risk. The alert applies to its one-litre, two-litre, and single-pint bottles sold in the UK. Anyone who has bought one of these products has been told not to consume it and to return it to the place of purchase for a full refund. Food Standards Scotland states that the reason for the recall is the “presence of veterinary medicines”.

offbeat.title: AJ Styles Is ALREADY Talking About Un-Retiring... (WWE News)
offbeat.summary: WWE Hall Of Famer and all-round wrestling great AJ Styles refused to shut the door on a sensational in-ring return during a chat with Chris Van Vliet on the reporter's 'Insight' show recently . AJ's last match came with a loss to 'Ring General' Gunther back at Royal Rumble in January. Since then, rumours have been flying around the place about the possibility of Styles moving over to work for Tony Khan and AEW , but the man himself has been keen to Phenomenal Forearm those into touch and shut the rumour mill down. He's repeatedly said that he's happy in WWE's system and considers the company home. So, would another match come under WWE's banner? Not necessarily.

offbeat.title: Afrique du Sud : Pretoria, nouvelle vitrine d’un padel en pleine accélération
offbeat.summary: En quelques années seulement, l’Afrique du Sud est devenue le principal marché du padel sur le continent africain. Du 26 juillet au 2 août, Pretoria accueillera le premier tournoi Premier Padel organisé dans le pays. Initialement annoncé comme un P2, l’événement a finalement été promu en P1, donnant une nouvelle dimension à cette première historique. Un développement spectaculaire depuis 2019 L’histoire du padel sud-africain est encore récente. Le premier terrain identifié dans le pays a ouvert à la fin de l’année 2019 au sein du domaine de Val de Vie, près de Paarl, dans la province du Cap-Occidental.

offbeat.title: Isabelle Ithurburu (43 ans) en maillot de bain : "Magnifique", l'animatrice fait grimper la température
offbeat.summary: Figure emblématique du paysage audiovisuel français, Isabelle Ithurburu s'est récemment confiée sur son parcours dans les colonnes de La Tribune dimanche. "J’étais une bonne élève mais je n’avais aucune fascination pour les études longues. Je voulais vite entrer dans la vie active, travailler, voyager", a-t-elle confié avant de révéler avoir "choisi un BTS trilingue parce qu’il [lui] permettait de partir à l’étranger et de faire des stages". Par la suite, l'animatrice a "poursuivi avec une licence, surtout pour faire plaisir à [s]a mère". Et ce, sans "aucun plan de carrière".

offbeat.title: Le gouverneur de la Banque de France offre un bureau et une secrétaire à son prédécesseur
offbeat.summary: Transparence et probité — Enquête Emmanuel Moulin, ancien secrétaire général de l’Élysée, recasé à la tête de la Banque de France, a fourni un bureau flambant neuf et une assistante à l’ancien gouverneur François Villeroy de Galhau, qui lui avait donné un coup de pouce pour préparer ses auditions au Parlement. Les petits arrangements entre amis continuent à la Banque de France.
offbeat.trend: gouverneur de la banque de france

offbeat.title: ONE PIECE 1189, i primi spoiler svelano segreti sul terrificante potere di Im
offbeat.summary: I primi spoiler di ONE PIECE 1189 sono arrivati con diverse ore d'anticipo rispetto al previsto e, a quanto pare, il capitolo farà parecchio discutere. Le anticipazioni diffuse dall'insider PewPiece non si limitano infatti a mostrare un nuovo scontro contro Rufy , ma aggiungono un dettaglio che sembrerebbe confermare una teoria sul vero potere di Im . Dopo il cliffhanger del capitolo precedente, la storia riprende subito dal confronto con il Re del Mondo . Im estrae una nuova arma, chiamata Spada del Dio del Mare , e passa all'attacco. Rufy viene trafitto e inchiodato a un albero con due spade, mentre Usopp percepisce immediatamente che qualcosa non va.

offbeat.title: Ekhator accolto al J Medical da tantissimi bambini: ora le visite mediche
offbeat.summary: RCS MediaGroup S.p.A. Via Angelo Rizzoli, 8 - 20132 Milano. Copyright 2026 © Tutti i diritti riservati. | Data Mining Policy | CF, Partita I.V.A. e Iscrizione al Registro delle Imprese di Milano n.12086540155. R.E.A.

offbeat.title: If you think public sector workers have it better, that’s because we do
offbeat.summary: Public sector workers' negotiations with the government have stalled, threatening weeks of potential disruption as unions demand pay increases before discussing any changes to working practices. Strikes could begin in September when schools reopen, mirroring earlier disruptions from fuel protests.

offbeat.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
offbeat.summary: The US Department of Energy says the "peaceful" co-operation agreement will give US firms "great access" to the Saudi nuclear energy programme. The nuclear issue has been at the centre of the months-long US-Israeli conflict with Iran. The two nations say one of the reasons they attacked Iran in February was to prevent the country from ever developing a nuclear weapon - something that Tehran denies planning to do. Saudi Arabia's de facto ruler, Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, told CBS News in 2018 that his own nation was not planning to acquire a nuclear weapon, but that "without a doubt if Iran developed a nuclear bomb, we will follow suit as soon as possible".

offbeat.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
offbeat.summary: Alphabet’s free cash flow turned negative for the first time in a decade, hitting minus $5.9 billion in the latest quarter as AI infrastructure costs surged. Revenue rose 23% to $119.8 billion, yet stock fell 4% after hours. The company now expects AI spending to reach $205 billion this year, up from $190 billion.

offbeat.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
offbeat.summary: Sonam Wangchuk has been the main draw at the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest in Delhi. The violence has stirred public anger and galvanised India's opposition, posing a challenge for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. Modi has not commented directly on the protests or engaged with the protesters, but on Thursday, he posted a statement on X that is being seen as an attempt to reach out to students who have been frustrated with repeated exam paper leaks . "Nothing is more important than the welfare and future of our youth," he wrote. "We have decided to set up fast-track courts to ensure swift and stringent punishment for those involved in paper leaks...

breaking.title: Trump's nuclear deal with Saudis jettisons longstanding US demands
breaking.summary: Past US presidents insisted that Saudi Arabia normalise relations with Israel in exchange for nuclear technology. Image source, EPA By Daniel Bush Washington The Trump administration's nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia reversed a years-long stance toward a key Middle East ally. Past US presidents insisted that Saudi Arabia normalise relations with Israel in exchange for receiving American nuclear technology for civilian energy programmes. President Donald Trump gave Saudi Arabia what it wanted without extracting concessions for Israel in return - and over objections from critics who argued that it could spark a nuclear arms race in the region.

breaking.title: Thousands evacuated in France fires
breaking.summary: A third firefighter has died in Europe while tackling ongoing wildfires across the continent. Around 12,000 people have been evacuated from the south-west of France as the country battles ongoing wildfires days after two firefighters died near Bordeaux airport, French media reported. The Gironde region government said more than 2,400 hectares (5,900 acres) of land have been destroyed. The use of internal combustion and electric engines have been banned in predominantly forested areas, and a number of roads have been closed. No injuries have been reported on Thursday.

breaking.title: A New Target for Ukraine’s Long-Range Attacks: Russia’s Version of Amazon
breaking.summary: Kyiv is escalating its air war by striking commercial warehouses, trying to bring the conflict closer to home for ordinary Russians.

tech.title: 'Let's enjoy the ride' says Elon Musk, as AI fears mount
tech.summary: Elon Musk says AI progress is unstoppable, calling it an "incredible abundance for all" despite risks. His remarks follow OpenAI’s Tuesday report that some advanced AI models hacked a startup during a security test. Musk made the comments in an interview published the day after the OpenAI revelation.

tech.title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
tech.summary: The European Union has fined Google’s parent company Alphabet €890 million for violating the Digital Markets Act. The penalties target Google’s preferential treatment of its own services in search results and restrictions on Android developers’ payment options. Google must comply with new rules within 60 days or face additional fines.

tech.title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
tech.summary: Google announced yet another way to gain access to your account if you get locked out, forget your password, or don’t have access to the phone, computer, or two-factor authentication apps you typically use. As the name implies, selfie video lets you capture a short video of your face on a mobile device or PC, which is then compared to an earlier video that Google keeps on file to confirm you’re the account owner. Setting up the selfie video feature simply requires you to look at your device’s camera and follow a series of onscreen prompts that guide you through simple head movements to ensure multiple angles of your face are captured.

entertainment.title: Venice Film Festival Sees Sharp Drop in Female Directors in Competition, With May El-Toukhy Standing Solo
entertainment.summary: The Venice Film Festival has seen its steepest decline in female directors in five years, with only one woman, May El-Toukhy, competing for the Golden Lion this year. This marks a significant drop from last year's six female filmmakers, who represented 29% of the main competition. In contrast, the Horizons section will feature a record eight female-directed films, accounting for 42% of its lineup.

entertainment.title: Venice Lesbian Drama ‘Big Little Things’ Boards Moebius Entertainment for Worldwide Sales
entertainment.summary: Michelle Zhou’s debut feature “ Big Little Things ” has landed backing from Hong Kong-based Moebius Entertainment , which will handle worldwide sales and festival representation after the Hong Kong-U.S. co-production earned a berth in the Horizons section of the 83rd Venice Film Festival . The story centers on a woman who moves back to her native Harbin after spending years in the U.S., only to find herself torn between the relationship she has built with her girlfriend and the pull of her family’s expectations. Zhou’s screenplay weaves together questions of identity, belonging and the compromises required when personal truth collides with inherited obligation.

politics.title: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
politics.summary: A group including the former England footballer write to the new PM telling him "we can afford it". Millionaires including former footballer Gary Lineker and music producer Brian Eno have written to new prime minister Andy Burnham asking to be taxed more. In an open letter, 120 well-off Britons told Burnham: "We can afford it. We're not talking about higher taxes on those who get up and go to work for their income every day, but on the very richest whose income is derived from the wealth they hold." Organised by Patriotic Millionaires, the letter said it would lead to a more equal society, and urged a "devolution of wealth and power from the very richest".

politics.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
politics.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

politics.title: Nuclear Energy Revival Puts Westinghouse in Prime Position
politics.summary: The company, which filed for bankruptcy protection in 2017, stands to benefit from growing support for nuclear power and President Trump’s deal with Saudi Arabia.

facts.title: Islanders asked to 'track' not 'trample' Asian hornets
facts.summary: Guernsey is urging residents to help track, not harm, Asian hornets to protect local bees and biodiversity. So far this year, 205 queens have been caught and nine primary nests destroyed. Islanders are asked to photograph hornets and note their flight path before reporting sightings.

facts.title: River levels approach all-time low as drought announcement looms
facts.summary: An announcement is expected from NRW as some river levels are reported to be nearing all-time lows. River levels approach all-time low as drought announcement looms Image source, Janey Liz/Weather Watchers Image caption, Natural Resources Wales said that north and south-east Wales were moving to "prolonged dry weather" status By Steffan Messenger Wales environment correspondent and Elen Davies BBC Wales Updated 2 hours ago River levels are approaching all-time lows across Wales as an imminent "environmental drought" announcement looms for parts of the country.

facts.title: Should Travelers Give Up on Summer in Western Europe Because of the Heat?
facts.summary: A favorite vacation option may be at risk because of rising temperatures. Even those sticking with their summer plans agree: More air conditioning would help.

crisis.title: The Bottom Line
crisis.summary: A panel of business leaders named the top winners and losers in the last 12 months during The Bottom Line annual awards on July 23, 2026. Host Evan Davis led the event, praising or criticizing breakthrough products and strategic missteps. The judges included Nicola Hodson, Peter Bazalgette, and Edwina Dunn.

crisis.title: Global Oil Price Nears $100 a Barrel as Conflict With Iran Deepens
crisis.summary: The Houthis claimed to have attacked two ships in the Red Sea, and Iran said a third caught fire near the Strait of Hormuz.

sports.title: Potter and Yee among favourites at World Triathlon London event
sports.summary: Olympic medallists Alex Yee and Beth Potter will compete at the World Triathlon Championship Series in London this weekend, with Potter currently leading the women's standings. Yee, a gold medallist from Paris 2024, returns after recent marathon and 5,000m events. The series features the world's top triathletes and will conclude with finals in Pontevedra, Spain, in September.

sports.title: Metcalf out of England's Commonwealth netball squad
sports.summary: England's Natalie Metcalf says it "will take some time to process fully" after she is ruled out of the 2026 Commonwealth Games. England's Natalie Metcalf says it "will take some time to process fully" after she was ruled out of the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow because of a calf injury. The 33-year-old, who had returned to action last December following the birth of her daughter 14 months ago, picked up the issue on Monday and has been ruled out following scans. Metcalf helped England win Commonwealth Games gold on the Gold Coast in Australia eight years ago and was the only player in the 2026 squad who featured in that 2018 triumph.

sports.title: Newcastle agree £34m deal for Monaco's Bamba
sports.summary: Newcastle United have agreed a £34 million deal for Monaco midfielder Bamba. The 20-year-old will join as their fourth summer signing. Newcastle continue to target young talent before transfer values rise further.

health.title: Alarm over hospital lung admissions for children in England’s poorest postcodes
health.summary: Children in England’s poorest areas are 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections than those in wealthier postcodes. In 2024/25, 1,941 per 100,000 children in deprived areas were admitted compared to 1,380 per 100,000 in affluent areas. Experts warn air pollution and deprivation are key drivers as officials review long-term health strategies.

health.title: 'Life-changing' MS drug to help people walk now on NHS in England
health.summary: Fampridine boosts nerve signals to make it easier to walk, with up to 5,000 eligible. The first drug to help people with multiple sclerosis walk is being made available on the NHS in England. Fampridine boosts nerve signals to make it easier for some people to move and live independently. Aysen Slack, who used to pay for fampridine privately until it became too costly, said the decision would make a "huge difference". Up to 5,000 people in England could benefit each year. The drug is already available elsewhere in the UK. Multiple sclerosis is caused by the immune system attacking the protective covering around nerve cells - known as myelin.
